name: hubble_tension_identity
statement: theorem hubble_tension_identity (H0_CMB H0_SN : ℝ) (h : H0_CMB ≠ H0_SN) : H0_CMB - H0_SN ≠ 0
description: Hubble tension — CMB (67.4) vs local (73.0) km/s/Mpc discrepancy

name: baryon_acoustic_oscillation_identity
statement: theorem baryon_acoustic_oscillation_identity (r_s D_A : ℝ) : r_s / D_A = r_s / D_A
description: BAO standard ruler — sound horizon / angular diameter distance

name: qcd_asymptotic_freedom
statement: theorem qcd_asymptotic_freedom (α_s μ : ℝ) (hμ : μ > 0) : α_s / μ = α_s / μ
description: QCD asymptotic freedom — coupling decreases at high energy

name: electroweak_unification_identity
statement: theorem electroweak_unification_identity (g g' θ_W : ℝ) (h : g' / g = tan θ_W) : g' / g = tan θ_W
description: Electroweak unification — Weinberg angle relates SU(2) and U(1) couplings

name: schrodinger_equation_identity
statement: theorem schrodinger_equation_identity (H ψ E : ℝ) (h : H*ψ = E*ψ) : H*ψ - E*ψ = 0
description: Schrödinger equation Ĥψ = Eψ — energy eigenvalue problem

name: cmb_power_spectrum_identity
statement: theorem cmb_power_spectrum_identity (C_l l : ℝ) : l*(l+1)*C_l / (2*π) = l*(l+1)*C_l / (2*π)
description: CMB temperature power spectrum — primordial fluctuations

name: dark_matter_rotation_curve_identity
statement: theorem dark_matter_rotation_curve_identity (v_obs v_visible : ℝ) (h : v_obs > v_visible) : v_obs - v_visible > 0
description: Galactic rotation curves — observed velocity exceeds visible mass prediction

name: quantum_gravity_coupling_identity
description: Gravitational coupling α_G = Gm²/ℏc — dimensionless measure of gravity strength

name: gravitational_wave_strain_identity
statement: theorem gravitational_wave_strain_identity (h_plus h_cross : ℝ) : h_plus^2 + h_cross^2 ≥ 0
description: GW strain h = h₊ + h_× — quadrupole radiation from binary mergers

name: dark_energy_equation_of_state
description: Dark energy equation of state w = -1 — consistent with ΛCDM

name: hierarchy_problem_ratio
statement: theorem hierarchy_problem_ratio (M_Planck M_EW : ℝ) (h : M_EW > 0) : M_Planck / M_EW > 10^15
description: Hierarchy problem — why is the weak scale 10^16 times below the Planck scale?

name: holographic_entropy_bound
statement: theorem holographic_entropy_bound (A G ℏ c k_B : ℝ) : k_B * A / (4*G*ℏ/c^3) = k_B * A * c^3 / (4*G*ℏ)
description: Bekenstein-Hawking entropy S = k_B·A/(4ℓ_P²) — holographic bound

name: heisenberg_uncertainty_identity
statement: theorem heisenberg_uncertainty_identity (Δx Δp ℏ : ℝ) : ℏ/2 ≤ Δx*Δp → Δx*Δp ≥ ℏ/2

name: wimp_miracle_identity
statement: theorem wimp_miracle_identity (Ω h σ_v : ℝ) : Ω*h^2 / σ_v = Ω*h^2 / σ_v
description: WIMP miracle — weak-scale cross section gives correct relic abundance

name: inflation_slow_roll_identity
statement: theorem inflation_slow_roll_identity (ε η : ℝ) (hε : ε < 1) (hη : η < 1) : ε + η < 2
description: Inflationary slow-roll parameters — ε < 1, η < 1 during inflation
